name: createSalaryAdvanceEntry

testSteps.description: Given that I'm logged in to 'Working Advances' page

children.description: When i open page from sidebar menu: {General Ledger,Salary Advance}

testSteps.description: Then the 'Working Advance Registration' page should show up
When I set the Currency to 'USD'
When I set the Amount to '1000'
When I set the Employee to 'Taramarcaz'
When I set the Line Ref to 'TEST1'
When I select the checkbox the first cash account row
Then the WAE successfully created modal should show up

title: Create salary advance entry
